name: Shinobu Kocho (Giantess)
description:
"Let's see how you deal with this poison..."

Shinobu, the fast fighter who dances like a butterfly, only this time her sword isn't imbued with poison, but a special variant of wisteria that causes demons to shrink.

Uppermoon demon POV, if it wasn't already obvious
